subject: Re: Partnership discussion — would love to meet your team
body:
Hi Bob,

Thank you for following up from Vendor Inc. after the conference. I'd be glad to set up a formal meeting to discuss potential partnership opportunities.

I'm open for a 30-minute call next week. Could you share a few options that work on your end? I'll check my calendar and confirm a slot.

Regarding direct contact details for senior leadership, I'll need to verify internally what information we're able to share at this stage. For now, I'm happy to be your point of contact and can help facilitate any senior-level discussions as we progress.

Looking forward to speaking with you!

Best regards
